summary.intent: Fix two issues raised in PR #807 review comments: conditional npm filtering and curl availability in NodeSource setup.
summary.outcome: Both issues were fixed in containers.rs and the corresponding test updated; all 5 sandbox dockerfile tests pass and fixes were committed.

repo: npm filtering in sandbox container setup must be conditional on nodejs being present
NodeSource setup step requires curl to be installed before it runs — ordering matters in Dockerfile generation logic
Sandbox container logic lives in crates/tools/src/sandbox/containers.rs with tests in crates/tools/src/sandbox/tests/docker_router.rs

code.finding: npm should only be filtered from package list when nodejs is also being installed; previously it was filtered unconditionally
Test for npm-without-nodejs case needed updating to expect npm to be retained after the conditional filtering fix

workflow: PR review comments were fetched via gh CLI and triaged before making edits
Rust formatting step (cargo fmt) is a required step before committing in this repo

friction: PR review surfaced a subtle ordering bug (curl used before installation) that wasn't caught by existing tests
